name: Channel Performance Review
description: Defend (or critique) a single advertising channel with structured evidence. Replaces the rushed pre-meeting prep when the CFO asks "why are we still spending on LinkedIn?"
alsoSurfaces: Why are we still spending on this channel?
How has this channel evolved over the last quarter?
What unique contribution does this channel make to the mix?
Should we continue, scale, scale-back, or pause?
beforeWeRun: Which channel to review (required input — name)?
Time window for current performance — trailing 90 days, or custom?
Comparison period — prior 90 days, or year-over-year?
Audience tone — CFO/CEO defensible, or marketing-team detailed?

whatYoullGet.name: Situation
whatYoullGet.desc: Channel's current state — spend, attributed pipeline, ROAS, role in mix. Concrete numbers, no spin.

whatYoullGet.name: Performance trajectory
whatYoullGet.desc: Two paragraphs on how performance has evolved. Period-over-period. Trajectory characterization (improving / stable / declining).

whatYoullGet.name: Channel dynamics
whatYoullGet.desc: Two paragraphs on channel-specific characteristics — typical sales cycle, role in multi-touch path, audience or saturation patterns.

whatYoullGet.name: Contribution context
whatYoullGet.desc: What this channel contributes that's unique. What would be lost if it stopped.

whatYoullGet.name: Recommendation
whatYoullGet.desc: Continue / scale up / scale down / pause — with rationale and confidence rating. Willing to recommend pause if data supports.

callout: 5 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your channel review in ~12 min.
